narrative:
Etna  Twp township has 13,856 registered voters, with 60.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
